title: Tesla Grok Covers All of Europe and Enters More Asian Countries, Voice-Controlled Air Conditioner, Glove Box, One Step at a Time
excerpt: Tesla has announced that its integrated xAI AI assistant Grok will soon cover the entire European market and also enter more Asian countries including India, Ma
content_html:
Tesla has announced that its integrated xAI AI assistant Grok will soon cover the entire European market and also enter more Asian countries including India, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, and Thailand. This expansion will be rolled out with the summer 2026 software update. The new version also adds vehicle control features to Grok, allowing drivers to make calls, control music playback, adjust the air conditioning, and even open the glove compartment with just voice commands.

From Chatbot to Vehicle Manager

Grok first launched on Tesla vehicles last summer, initially available only to users in the United States. At first, it mainly functioned as a chatbot, answering general knowledge questions or engaging in storytelling interactions. Subsequently, Tesla continued to expand its capabilities, and it now supports natural language navigation operations and location-based reminder functions. The summer 2026 update takes this further, enabling Grok to directly control vehicle hardware. Owners can wake it up by saying "Hey Grok" and then perform tasks such as making phone calls, searching for and playing music, adjusting the air conditioning, and even controlling seat ventilation and heating through voice commands.

Future Integration with FSD, Musk Says Voice-Controlled Driving Will Be Released This Autumn

Musk confirmed earlier this year that the integration of Grok and FSD is already under development. Tesla's goal is to turn Grok into a true "virtual driver," capable of understanding instructions given by drivers in natural language, such as parking the car by the roadside or changing lanes automatically. Musk said last month that the FSD voice control feature for Grok could be released as early as this autumn, and it may take about three more months. As Grok gradually covers more vehicle functions, drivers may no longer need to touch the central display, completing most operations just through voice commands.

sentences.en: Tesla has announced that its integrated xAI AI assistant Grok will soon cover the entire European market and also enter more Asian countries including India, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, and Thailand.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉宣布，其集成的xAI人工智能助手Grok很快将覆盖整个欧洲市场，并进入更多亚洲国家，包括印度、马来西亚、菲律宾、新加坡和泰国。

sentences.en: This expansion will be rolled out with the summer 2026 software update.
sentences.zh: 此扩展将随 2026 年夏季软件更新一起推出。

sentences.en: The new version also adds vehicle control features to Grok, allowing drivers to make calls, control music playback, adjust the air conditioning, and even open the glove compartment with just voice commands.
sentences.zh: 新版本还为 Grok 增加了车辆控制功能，驾驶员只需通过语音命令即可拨打电话、控制音乐播放、调节空调，甚至打开手套箱。
从聊天机器人到车辆管理器

sentences.en: The summer 2026 update takes this further, enabling Grok to directly control vehicle hardware.
sentences.zh: 2026 年夏季更新更进一步，使 Grok 能够直接控制车辆硬件。

sentences.en: Owners can wake it up by saying "Hey Grok" and then perform tasks such as making phone calls, searching for and playing music, adjusting the air conditioning, and even controlling seat ventilation and heating through voice commands.
sentences.zh: 车主可以通过说“Hey Grok”来唤醒它，然后执行诸如拨打电话、搜索和播放音乐、调节空调、甚至通过语音命令控制座椅通风和加热等任务。

sentences.zh: 未来与FSD整合，马斯克称语音控制驾驶将于今年秋季发布

Musk said last month that the FSD voice control feature for Grok could be released as early as this autumn, and it may take about three more months. As Grok gradually covers more vehicle functions, drivers may no longer need to touch the central display, completing most operations just through voice commands.

sentences.zh: 马斯克今年早些时候证实，Grok 和 FSD 的集成已经在开发中。

sentences.en: Tesla's goal is to turn Grok into a true "virtual driver," capable of understanding instructions given by drivers in natural language, such as parking the car by the roadside or changing lanes automatically.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉的目标是将 Grok 变成真正的“虚拟驾驶员”，能够理解驾驶员用自然语言给出的指令，例如将汽车停在路边或自动变道。

sentences.en: Musk said last month that the FSD voice control feature for Grok could be released as early as this autumn, and it may take about three more months.
sentences.zh: 马斯克上个月表示，Grok 的 FSD 语音控制功能最早可能在今年秋天发布，而且可能还需要三个月左右的时间。

sentences.en: As Grok gradually covers more vehicle functions, drivers may no longer need to touch the central display, completing most operations just through voice commands.
sentences.zh: 随着Grok逐渐覆盖更多的车辆功能，驾驶员可能不再需要触摸中央显示屏，只需通过语音命令即可完成大部分操作。

content_html_zh:
特斯拉宣布，其集成的xAI人工智能助手Grok很快将覆盖整个欧洲市场，并进入更多亚洲国家，包括印度、马来西亚、菲律宾、新加坡和泰国。 此扩展将随 2026 年夏季软件更新一起推出。 新版本还为 Grok 增加了车辆控制功能，驾驶员只需通过语音命令即可拨打电话、控制音乐播放、调节空调，甚至打开手套箱。

从聊天机器人到车辆管理器

Grok 去年夏天首次在特斯拉汽车上推出，最初仅向美国用户提供。 最初，它主要充当聊天机器人，回答常识性问题或进行讲故事的互动。 随后，特斯拉不断扩展其能力，现在支持自然语言导航操作和基于位置的提醒功能。 2026 年夏季更新更进一步，使 Grok 能够直接控制车辆硬件。 车主可以通过说“Hey Grok”来唤醒它，然后执行诸如拨打电话、搜索和播放音乐、调节空调、甚至通过语音命令控制座椅通风和加热等任务。

未来与FSD整合，马斯克称语音控制驾驶将于今年秋季发布

马斯克今年早些时候证实，Grok 和 FSD 的集成已经在开发中。 特斯拉的目标是将 Grok 变成真正的“虚拟驾驶员”，能够理解驾驶员用自然语言给出的指令，例如将汽车停在路边或自动变道。 马斯克上个月表示，Grok 的 FSD 语音控制功能最早可能在今年秋天发布，而且可能还需要三个月左右的时间。 随着Grok逐渐覆盖更多的车辆功能，驾驶员可能不再需要触摸中央显示屏，只需通过语音命令即可完成大部分操作。
